title: artemisia dracunculoides var. dracunculina
intro: Artemisia dracunculoides var. dracunculina, also known as Russian tarragon or wormwood, is a perennial herb native to Asia and Eastern Europe. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, to treat fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Artemisia dracunculoides var. dracunculina include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health concerns. Artemisia dracunculoides var. dracunculina can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in cooking to add flavor and aroma to various dishes.
